title: alchemilla vulgaris proles semisecta
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris proles semisecta, commonly known as lady's mantle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the rose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and astringent effects, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and menstrual cramps. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce bleeding, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of lady's mantle can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
